dialogos.texto_en: (I have a feeling that something is off.)
(It feels like Futaro has been hiding something\n since we arrived at Shurijo Castle.)
We circled around Shurijo Castle.
We walked quite a bit... Let me take a break.
Wasn't there a rest area over there?\nDo they sell drinks?
It seems like there's a café.\nI'm thirsty! Let's go inside and take a break.
Yeah, that's a good idea.
Okay, let's go!
Ichika, Miku.\nCan I talk to you for a moment?
What?
Are you two hiding something from me?
Huh? What do you mean?
We're not hiding anything.
You were talking to Futaro about something, right?
Ah, so you noticed.
He was trying to hide something from me, wasn't he?
So, what were you talking about behind my back?
It's nothing that you need to worry about, Nino.
Actually, Futaro cares about you in his own way.\nThat's the only thing going on.
That's right.\nFutaro-kun is just trying his best for your sake.
Really?
It's true. You shouldn't doubt him like that,\nit's not like you%p-2;――
You're not getting mad at me, right?
Guess not.
Maybe I know why.
What do you mean?
(It feels like as if I have done something\n to trouble Futaro.\n So, that's why he talked to everyone...)
(This is the vacation before we are going to start our\n long-distance relationship. I want to create memories together\n and get closer to him.)
(I was quite proactive in my approach, I know that.)
(Maybe...it's backfiring on me?)
(Even though,\n I never intended to cause trouble for Futaro.)
Nino?
Love is really complicated.\nEven after finding it,\nit's still so difficult.
(I thought that if I loved him,\n everything would be okay, but sometimes I wonder\n if I'm the only one who's getting carried away%p-2;――%p;)
(Now I'm worrying...that I'm the only one\n who wants to deepen the relationship.)
Even after becoming a couple, managing a relationship is still \ndifficult, huh.
I've played that kind of role in dramas before,\nbut that scenario is real, huh.
Yeah.
But you'll be okay, Nino.
Miku?
Because Futaro's with you, Nino.
I can see that the relationship with Futaro-kun leaves you\nconcerned, Nino.
And I also get you, Miku.\nWell that's what a relationship with Futaro-kun looks like, Nino.
(I want to believe that everything will be okay.\n But...)
